action.reasoning: Observation: Best eval score 0.5768, room success only 80%. Training shows alpha=1.0 scores best (0.8200). Analysis: Main bottleneck is success rate - failed episodes contribute 0. Need: 1) Stuck detection (explored_rate not improving → switch strategy), 2) Better frontier navigation through graph (numpy-based nearest node lookup), 3) Single BFS with predecessors for efficient pathfinding. Decision: Rewrite predict.py with stuck detection (lower alpha when stuck), better frontier fallback, alpha=1.0 default. Quick local test then submit eval.
